name: Spotify
collaborationStyle: playlist integration, artist discovery story, streaming feature showcase
notes: Natural fit for any music creator; strong crossover with lifestyle and education niches

name: Apple Music
collaborationStyle: artist spotlight, spatial audio story, album launch integration
notes: Apple-mediated; selective but strong fit for music review, artist vlog, and hi-fi audio creators

name: Gibson
collaborationStyle: guitar showcase, artist story, performance integration
notes: One of the most iconic guitar brands in history; highly selective; strong fit for guitar-focused creators with a rock or blues angle

name: Fender
collaborationStyle: guitar/bass review, artist story, Fender Play integration
notes: Extremely active creator program via Fender Play; accessible to micro creators; strongest guitar brand for broad music content

name: Roland
collaborationStyle: synth/drum machine showcase, studio gear review, performance integration
notes: Legendary electronic instrument brand; strong fit for producers, beatmakers, and synth-focused creators

name: Yamaha
collaborationStyle: instrument review, music education integration, performance showcase
notes: Covers piano, guitar, drums, and pro audio; extremely wide fit across all music creator sub-niches

name: Shure
collaborationStyle: microphone review, studio setup showcase, live performance integration
notes: Industry-standard microphone brand; strong crossover between music and podcast/creator tool niches

name: Ableton
collaborationStyle: DAW tutorial, production workflow showcase, beat-making integration
notes: The DAW of choice for electronic and modern music producers; extremely strong fit for beat-making and music production creators

name: Sennheiser
collaborationStyle: headphone/microphone review, studio monitoring story, audiophile integration
notes: Premium audio brand covering headphones, mics, and wireless systems; wide fit across music, podcast, and audiophile creators

name: Native Instruments
collaborationStyle: plugin showcase, MIDI controller review, production workflow integration
notes: Maker of Traktor, Maschine, and Komplete; extremely active in creator space; strong fit for electronic music and DJ creators

name: Splice
collaborationStyle: sample library showcase, production workflow story, plugin rent-to-own demo
notes: Sample and plugin subscription platform; one of the most active music creator sponsors; very fast onboarding

name: Sweetwater
collaborationStyle: gear review, studio setup story, affiliate integration
notes: Largest US music retailer; extremely active affiliate and sponsorship program; wide creator range accepted

name: iZotope
collaborationStyle: mixing/mastering tutorial, plugin showcase, production quality story
notes: Leading audio plugin brand for mixing and mastering; high CPM due to professional producer audience

name: Focusrite
collaborationStyle: home studio setup, audio interface review, recording workflow showcase
notes: Scarlett audio interface is the most popular beginner studio purchase; extremely strong fit across all music creator sizes

name: Landr
collaborationStyle: AI mastering story, music distribution demo, production workflow integration
notes: AI mastering and music distribution platform; great fit for independent artist and home studio creator content

name: DistroKid
collaborationStyle: music distribution story, indie artist journey, release workflow demo
notes: Most popular music distribution platform among independent artists; very active sponsorship program; easy integration for artist-focused creators

name: Waves Audio
collaborationStyle: plugin showcase, mixing tutorial, studio workflow integration
notes: Industry-standard plugin brand; high CPM due to professional audio audience; active creator sponsorship program

name: Reverb.com
collaborationStyle: gear buying story, instrument showcase, vintage gear hunt
notes: Online marketplace for musicians buying and selling gear; strong fit for gear review and instrument collection creators

name: Arturia
collaborationStyle: synth review, analog modeling showcase, production workflow demo
notes: French synth and plugin brand with a passionate following; ideal for electronic music and synthesis-focused creators

name: Output
collaborationStyle: plugin showcase, cinematic production story, sound design integration
notes: Premium plugin and sample brand used in film and TV scoring; ideal for creators covering cinematic or hybrid music production

name: Melodics
collaborationStyle: finger drumming tutorial, beat-making skill story, practice routine integration
notes: Music practice app for beat-making and keys; strong fit for music education and beginner producer creators

name: Soundtrap
collaborationStyle: collaborative music making story, browser DAW demo, beginner production tutorial
notes: Spotify-owned browser-based DAW; ideal for music education and beginner creator content

name: Plug In Baby (Plugin Boutique)
collaborationStyle: plugin review, production tool showcase, deal/sale integration
notes: Large plugin marketplace with active affiliate program; ideal for music production review and tutorial creators

name: Rokit (KRK)
collaborationStyle: studio monitor review, home studio setup showcase, mixing environment story
notes: Iconic yellow studio monitor brand; strong fit for home studio setup and mixing-focused music creators

name: Pianoforall

notes: Popular online piano learning course; strong fit for piano tutorial and music education creators

name: Bandlab

notes: Free cloud-based DAW with massive global user base; ideal for beginner music production and creator community channels

name: Strandberg Guitars

notes: Swedish headless guitar brand with cult following among progressive and metal guitarists; ideal for modern guitar creators

notes: Superior Drummer and EZDrummer maker; ideal for rock, metal, and drum production-focused creators

name: Songtrust

notes: Boutique plugin brand specializing in generative and randomized music tools; ideal for experimental and sound design creators

name: Flowkey

name: Yousician
